zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Vere於1440年出生在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆時，她的父親Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford32歲，母親Elizabeth Howard30歲。她於1457年與Sir William Norreys在英國英格蘭波克夏布雷結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1471年之前在英國武斯特斯爾亨利 卡素，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Vere于1440年出生在英国艾可卡素 丁加姆时，她的父亲Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford32岁，母亲Elizabeth Howard30岁。她于1457年与Sir William Norreys在英国英格兰波克夏布雷结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1471年之前在英国武斯特斯爾亨利 卡素，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Vere was born in 1440, in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, her father, Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford, was 32 and her mother, Elizabeth Howard, was 30. She married Sir William Norreys in 1457, in Bray, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 1471, in Hanley Castle, Worcestershire, England, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Vere est née en 1440, à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Howard, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Norreys en 1457, à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1471, à Hanley Castle, Worcestershire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Vere 1440 in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford 32 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Howard 30. Sie hat 1457 in Bray, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1471 in Hanley Castle, Worcestershire, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Vere è nata il nel 1440 nel Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Howard, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Norreys nel 1457, nel Bray, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1471, nel Hanley Castle, Worcestershire, England, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Vereが1440年にイギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxfordは32歳，母Elizabeth Howardは30歳であった。1457年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアブレイでSir William Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1471年以前にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアハンリー カストルで死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Vere(이)가 1440년 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Howard(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 브라이에서 Sir William Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 이전 영국 워스스터실르 핸리 카스틀에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Bray, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom: Bray, Bearrucscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Vere nasceu em 1440, em Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Howard, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Norreys em 1457, em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1471, em Hanley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Vere родилась в 1440 г. в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Howard, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Norreys в 1457 г. в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 1471 г. в местности ханли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Vere nació en 1440, en Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Howard, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir William Norreys en 1457, en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1471, en Hanley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
